entry.title: BILL022(26) (Honolulu): CCL → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE EXECUTIVE OPERATING BUDGET AND PROGRAM FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2026 TO JUNE 30, 2027.

Appropriates funds for the Executive Operating Budget for Fiscal Year 2027.

Status: CCL → PUBLISH

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL022(26) (Honolulu): MAYOR → CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE EXECUTIVE OPERATING BUDGET AND PROGRAM FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2026 TO JUNE 30, 2027.

Appropriates funds for the Executive Operating Budget for Fiscal Year 2027.

Status: MAYOR → CCL

Latest action: Bill 22, CD2, FD1 (Ordinance 26-18) Passed final reading, the Mayor’s veto to the contrary notwithstanding on all lined items as indicated in the Ordinance. Enter into the Council Journal. MM-85(26) - Returning vetoed certain portions of Bill 22 (2026), CD2, FD1

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL022(26) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE EXECUTIVE OPERATING BUDGET AND PROGRAM FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2026 TO JUNE 30, 2027.

Appropriates funds for the Executive Operating Budget for Fiscal Year 2027.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site
